sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18539" key="a)frosibo/mbac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφροσῐβόμβαξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ακος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n18539.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">puffing, bustling fellow,</tr_> Timo <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">29</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
